{{CargoRelic
|name=Ink Chrysanths
|class_id=22270
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|birthday=10-14
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.11%)
|description=On Oct 14, 1567 AD, Xu Wei gave the Ink Chrysanth to a friend while studying in Hangzhou.<br>Xu Wei, literary name Qingteng, or green vine, was one of the three great talents of the Ming Dynasty known for his great skills in calligraphy and painting. His self-created ink-splashed freehand flower and bird painting method integrating the strengths of many painting schools is innovative. His paintings are full of transitions and changes; in particular, the chrysanthemums that he painted are tall, upright, and clustered with each other, bursting with color and life.
|fame=47
|art=109
|fth=66
|civ=84
|tech=56
|ss1=All Minion ATK +0.6%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +30<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +3<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss2=All Minion ATK +0.8%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +40<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +4<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss3=All Minion ATK +1%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +50<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +5<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss4=All Minion ATK +1.4%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +70<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +7<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss5=All Minion ATK +1.8%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +90<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +9<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss6=All Minion ATK +2.4%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +120<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +12<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120
|ss7=All Minion ATK +2.4%<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail HP +120<br>Per 2 ART Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +12<br>ART Master Scrolls Used: 120/120<br>All Minion ATK +2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Fire DMG +300
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's ART +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x White Card Drops +6%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Nobles of Plants|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Toner, +200|orange}}
|3name=Ink Plum|3rec=46.28M|3atk=163403|3defense=109012|3hp=7302357|3weak=21013
|4name=Ink Orchid|4rec=59.57M|4atk=191414|4defense=127700|4hp=9644219|4weak=23686
|5name=Ink Bamboo|5rec=73.91M|5atk=221667|5defense=147882|5hp=12517895|5weak=29478
|6name=Ink Chrysanths|6rec=89.71M|6atk=254983|6defense=170109|6hp=16046605|6weak=32640
|Arec=107.24M|Aatk=291958|Adefense=194777|Ahp=20268678|Aweak=35751
}}}}
